programs.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programs.desc: For Larry, a second weight-loss surgery would mean a second chance at a career as a gospel recording artist.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programs.desc: Six couples on the brink of breakup arrive at a resort for intensive therapy; the couples must work through infidelity, lack of intimacy, and distrust in order to move forward together.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programs.desc: The couples head to the desert for a group therapy called Compromise Canyon; they carry rocks that represent their issues and need to lighten their loads by hashing it out; Gino and Jasmine get into a huge fight; Jasmine calls a friend for support.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.sub_title: Between the Sheets: The Art of Dragging
programs.desc: After watching Gino and Natalie having fun at the drag brunch, some bedroom secrets about Gino are revealed. Vanja breaks down watching her fight with Tony. Jamal and Kim react to the letter from Kim's daughter and where they go next.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.sub_title: Between the Sheets: The Art of the Slow Fade
programs.desc: Sophie cringes reliving her date with Brian and gets some extra intel from Julia. The cast is at their wits' end watching Cortney entertain Colt back in Orlando. Everyone has big opinions about Gino's breakup and Kim's first date with Wayne.

programs.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programs.sub_title: More to Love: The Act of Orbiting
programs.desc: With bonus scenes; Colt recovers from surgery while living with Cortney and her new boyfriend; Pedro blows up after discovering Sophie kissed her date; Vanja breaks her celibacy and meets Tony's parents.
